[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111011 6
1 0010101 3
2 1000011 3
3 1001110 4
4 0011111 5
5 1000000 1
6 0010011 3
7 1111111 a

01 10 0001110 3
12 21 0000000 a
23 32 0000000 a
34 43 0010011 3 match 6
45 54 1111011 6 match 0
56 65 0010001 2
67 76 0000001 1
70 07 1000010 2

02 20 1000000 1 match 5
13 31 0010011 3 match 6
24 42 1000000 1 match 5
35 53 0010011 3 match 6
46 64 0010101 3 match 1
57 75 1000011 3 match 2
60 06 0000100 1
71 17 0000011 2

03 30 0000010 1

36 63 0010001 2
47 74 1000011 3 match 2
50 05 1001010 3
61 16 0010101 3 match 1
72 27 1000000 1 match 5

15 51 0011011 4
26 62 0000000 a
37 73 0000011 2
